name: ocos-api
description: Internal OCOS plugin for exposing organization, project, incident, and report tooling to Codex.

interface.longDescription: Read-only OCOS-native tooling so Codex can inspect incidents, reports, projects, and project cockpits from the OmniaCreata control plane.
defaultPrompt: Read the current OCOS org summary and highlight the top risks.
Open the Studio project cockpit and summarize active incidents.
Review the latest OCOS reports and recommend the safest next action.
